posts.title: Understanding React Hooks
posts.author: John Doe
posts.description: An introduction to React Hooks and how they can simplify your React code.
posts.content: React Hooks are functions that let you use state and other React features without writing a class. They were introduced in React 16.8 and have become a fundamental part of modern React development...
